overview.description: The T. Rowe Price Total Return ETF (TOTR) is an exchange-traded fund. The ETF currently has 564.93m in AUM and 1110 holdings. TOTR is an actively managed fund that provides diversified exposure to US fixed income securities. TOTR was launched on Sep 28, 2021 and is issued by T. Rowe Price.
